news.headline: Oil faces 'soggy' fundamentals and tariff risks in 2025 - BNP Paribas
Trane Technologies plc sets new $5 billion share repurchase program after having $1.5 billion remaining from the 2022 program.
news.summary: Trane Technologies plc, a global climate innovator, based in Swords, has announced a new share repurchase program. The Board of Directors has authorized this program of up to $5 billion. This will start after the completion of the current $3 billion program from 2022. The remaining amount in the 2022 program, as of October 31, 2024, is around $1.5 billion. The decision was made based on the company's robust balance sheet, liquidity position, and the ongoing confidence in its capability to produce substantial future free cash flow.

news.headline: 9fin promotes Kerry McClelland to CFO after leading $50m Series B round, executed within 3 months of joining in June 2024.
news.summary: In London, 9fin, the data and analytics platform for debt capital markets, has appointed Kerry McClelland as Chief Financial Officer, promoting her from VP Finance. Kerry, who joined the company in June 2024 after serving as CFO for Fiit, a B2B SaaS fitness app, played a crucial role in securing 9fin's $50 million Series B round. The funding was led by Highland Europe and finalized in December 2024. Impressively, the financing process was completed within just three months, a rapid achievement under Kerry's leadership within her first six months at the company.

news.headline: China probes Nvidia on suspicion of anti-monopoly law breaches.
Healthcare Realty Trust reveals significant leadership shifts; provides updated info on key executives.
news.summary: The latest report reveals that the annual inflation rate has climbed to 5.8%, marking a sharp increase from the previous month. This surge in inflation is largely attributed to the steep rise in energy prices, which have shot up by 12%. Additionally, the cost of food has also experienced a noticeable increase, reaching a growth rate of 7.2%. Economists express concern over the impact of this rapid inflation on consumers' purchasing power and overall economic stability. In response to these developments, the central bank has indicated that it may consider implementing measures to curb inflation and ensure price stability in the market.

news.headline: China's SAMR opens probe into Nvidia, according to CCTV

Global cosmetic manufacturing market expected to reach $878.88 billion by 2034 at 6.4% CAGR, influenced by social media & beauty influencers. North America leads with $193.05 billion by 2034; Europe at $171.52 billion in 2024. China to reach $71.34 billion by 2034. East Asia market to grow at 6.9% CAGR.
news.summary: A recent report by Fact.MR predicts that the global revenue from the Cosmetic Manufacturing Market is expected to hit US$ 473.38 billion in 2024, and grow at a rate of 6.4% annually until 2034. Social media platforms like Instagram and YouTube are influencing consumer decisions and setting beauty trends, with beauty influencers playing a significant role in boosting demand for cosmetic products through product demonstrations and personalized recommendations. North America leads the market due to a large consumer base and preference for high-end and natural beauty products. Valuation of the global cosmetic manufacturing market is projected to reach US$ 878.88 billion by 2034, with Europe, North America, and East Asia showing significant growth potential. China is expected to reach a market value of US$ 71.34 billion by 2034. The market in South Korea is forecasted to grow at a substantial CAGR of 7.8% through 2034. The market also suggests a rising demand for cosmetics in grocery stores and supermarkets.

news.headline: Bill Gates criticizes cryptocurrencies and NFTs as a sham. In June 2022, when Bitcoin price was $22,206.79, he questioned their value.
news.summary: Bill Gates, co-founder of Microsoft Corp., has expressed harsh criticism towards cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin and non-fungible tokens (NFTs), describing them as based on the "greater fool theory". In a speech at a climate conference in June 2022, Gates emphasized his skepticism towards these digital assets, stating he neither supports nor opposes them and prefers investments with tangible value. At the time of his comments on Jun. 14, 2022, the price of one Bitcoin stood at $22,206.79.

news.headline: Immutable (IMX) launches Gems to boost Web3 gaming engagement with ongoing rewards and dynamic quests. (Count: 94)
news.summary: Immutable (IMX) has unveiled a new continuous reward system named Gems, with the goal of boosting player interaction in Web3 gaming by offering ongoing rewards and dynamic quests. The platform seeks to provide an engaging experience for players in the Web3 gaming space.

news.headline: Azimut discovers multi-kilometre-scale spodumene pegmatite field in Quebec; 39-km Wabamisk Property.
news.summary: In Longueuil, Quebec, on December 9, 2024, Azimut Exploration Inc. revealed the discovery of a large spodumene pegmatite field named "Lithos" on its 39-kilometre-long Wabamisk Property in the Eeyou Istchee James Bay region of Quebec. The company, listed as TSXV: AZM and OTCQX: AZMTF, expressed excitement over this find.

news.headline: MEDIROM receives orders for 25,000+ MOTHER Bracelet units, including from NFES Technologies Inc.
news.summary: In Tokyo on December 09, 2024, MEDIROM Healthcare Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: MRM) revealed that its subsidiary, MEDIROM MOTHER Labs Inc., has secured orders exceeding 25,000 units of the MOTHER Bracelet. These orders encompass requests from various Japanese businesses, with notable mentions including NFES Technologies Inc.

news.headline: Radisson discovers high-grade gold at O’Brien, 1,345 g/t over 1 metre, likely rediscovery of famous "Jewellery Box".
news.summary: In the latest report, it has been revealed that approximately 10,000 residents in the city have been affected by the recent water contamination issue. The authorities have confirmed that the contamination stems from a nearby industrial plant, which has been releasing toxic chemicals into the water supply. As a result, over 50 people have been hospitalized with symptoms of poisoning, including nausea and vomiting. The city officials are working on resolving the issue and providing clean water to the affected residents as soon as possible. Additionally, the plant responsible for the contamination is facing severe penalties and possible shutdown following the incident.

news.headline: Healthcare Realty Trust adds new Chair and 3 directors, signs agreement with Starboard Value.
news.summary: Tom Bohjalian has been elected as the Independent Chair of the Board, while Independent Directors David Henry, Glenn Rufrano, and Don Wood have been appointed to the board. The company has also entered into a cooperation agreement with Starboard Value.

news.headline: Nevada King reports +1 g/t gold intercepts, incl. 1.95 g/t Au over 29.0m & 6.6 g/t Au over 6.1m at Atlanta.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 9, 2024, Nevada King Gold Corp. (TSXV: NKG) (OTC: NKGFF) has shared the outcomes of drilling operations. The company reported findings from 20 vertical, reverse circulation holes and one diamond core drill hole that were carried out in the North Extension Target area.

news.headline: Nuvalent, Inc. appoints Grant Bogle to Board of Directors; focused on creating therapies for cancer.
news.summary: Nuvalent, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, revealed on December 9, 2024, that Grant Bogle has been appointed to its Board of Directors. Nuvalent concentrates on developing tailored therapies for established kinase targets in cancer. The company is listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange under the ticker symbol NUVL.

news.headline: Ashland partners with Arbor Day Foundation to plant trees, honoring 100 years of innovation and supporting sustainability.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Wilmington, Delaware, Ashland Inc. (NYSE: ASH), a renowned additives and specialty ingredients company, revealed a new collaboration with the Arbor Day Foundation. This partnership commemorates Ashland Inc.'s 100-year milestone and acknowledges the significant contributions of its global solvers in driving innovation.

news.headline: TXNM Energy (NYSE: TXNM) to affirm 2024 earnings guidance in meetings with investors in NYC.
news.summary: During meetings in New York City this week, TXNM Energy, Inc. (NYSE: TXNM) management is set to affirm their 2024 ongoing earnings guidance. The discussions with analysts and investors are scheduled in ALBUQUERQUE, N.M., on Dec. 9, 2024.

news.headline: 2025 U.S. Army Bowl Regional Combine Series to host 14 events connecting 3,500+ student-athletes to Signing Day Sports App.
news.summary: Over the next four months, a series of 14 events are set to take place, with a projected attendance of over 3,500 student-athletes. These events aim to link the participants with the Signing Day Sports App and Recruiting Platform.

news.headline: Osage Advisors facilitates sale of Falcon Electronics to Brevan Electronics in Dec. 2024.
news.summary: In Centerbrook, Connecticut on December 9, 2024, Osage Advisors, a prominent mergers and acquisitions firm, successfully facilitated the sale of their client, Falcon Electronics, to Brevan Electronics. Falcon Electronics, a top distributor, was acquired by Brevan Electronics through this transaction.

news.headline: Valens Semiconductor appoints Gili Friedman as SVP, Head of Cross Industry Business. Leader in connectivity. Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: In Hod Hasharon, Israel, on December 9, 2024, Valens Semiconductor (NYSE: VLN), a prominent high-performance connectivity provider, revealed the appointment of Gili Friedman as the Senior Vice President and Head of the recently established Cross Industry Business Unit.

news.headline: Affimed to discuss AFM24-102 trial data with atezolizumab for lung cancer on Dec. 17 at 8:30am EST.
news.summary: Affimed N.V., a company focused on immuno-oncology, will be conducting a conference call on December 17, 2024. The call, scheduled for 8:30 a.m. EST / 14:30 CET, will discuss clinical data from the AFM24-102 trial, involving the combination of AFM24 ICE® and atezolizumab in non-small cell lung cancer. Affimed is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol AFMD.

news.headline: EMA validates submission to label pegunigalsidase alfa for Fabry disease at 2 mg/kg every 4 weeks in EU.
news.summary: Chiesi Global Rare Diseases has submitted an application to approve a less frequent dosing regimen for patients with Fabry disease in the European Union. The proposed dose is 2 mg/kg body weight given every four weeks. This application was filed on December 9, 2024, in Parma, Italy, and Carmiel, Israel.

news.headline: Ducommun Incorporated won Gold 'Partner2Win' Medallion from BAE Systems for exceptional performance in 2024.
news.summary: Ducommun Incorporated, a leading global provider of innovative electronic and structural products for the aerospace and defense sector, was awarded a prestigious Gold ‘Partner2Win’ medallion by BAE Systems at their recent supplier symposium on November 12, 2024. This recognition was in honor of Ducommun's outstanding performance and dedication to operational excellence throughout the year. By supporting BAE Systems in achieving quality and timely deliveries to customers, Ducommun's contributions have been instrumental in ensuring supply chain success.

news.headline: Parsons wins $53M contract for Riyadh roads project in Saudi Arabia.
news.summary: Parsons Corporation disclosed today that it has secured a $53 million contract from the Royal Commission for Riyadh City (RCRC) in Saudi Arabia. The contract spans three years and pertains to program management office (PMO) services for the Main and Ring Roads Program. The agreement marks a significant development in Parsons Corporation’s portfolio as it continues to expand its presence in the Middle East region.

news.headline: Pan American Silver reports annual exploration update for multiple mines, expects organic growth.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Pan American Silver Corp. (NYSE: PAAS) (TSX: PAAS) has shared its annual exploration update and revealed fresh exploration drill findings for various mines and projects. The update covers Jacobina, El Peñon, La Colorada, Huaron, Minera Florida, and Timmins mines, along with the La Colorada Skarn project. Christopher Emerson, VP of the company, stated that the exploration program's accomplishments point towards substantial potential for sustainable growth in numerous assets.

news.headline: BoE to increase reserves available in ILTR operations.
VirnetX hires Dr. John Anthony Jamison as new Chief Technical Officer, former Naval Intelligence Officer.
news.summary: In Zephyr Cove, Nevada on December 9, 2024, VirnetX Holding Corporation revealed the appointment of Dr. John Anthony Jamison as their new Chief Technical Officer (CTO). Dr. Jamison previously held the position of Naval Intelligence Officer from May 1997 to January 2018. VirnetX, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol VHC, added Dr. Jamison to lead its technical operations.

news.headline: Argus debuts daily Greek natural gas prices, boosting transparency in European market amid 2024 volatility.
news.summary: In London on December 9, 2024, Argus, a leading global energy and commodity price reporting agency, announced the introduction of daily price assessments for Greece's natural gas market. These assessments mark the first of their kind for the country and aim to enhance transparency in Europe's gas market during a period of heightened volatility. This initiative underscores the importance of timely and accurate pricing information for market participants.

news.headline: Korea opposition party to push budget and financial tax bills on Tuesday - Daily
AI feared to increase identity theft; 43% US victims, 1 in 5 children. 60% believe surge by 2025.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Debt.com revealed that a staggering 43% of individuals have experienced identity theft, with over 1 in 5 cases involving children. The study, based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, also found that 6 out of 10 respondents anticipate that the advancement of artificial intelligence will further facilitate the spread of this criminal activity.

news.headline: Brera Holdings to invest in Italian Serie B club Juve Stabia with a 51.72% shareholding, alongside current owner.
news.summary: A binding term sheet has been agreed upon for continuous investment in a historic Italian club, located in the country's third-largest metropolitan area. The term sheet includes a 51.72% shareholding and involves the current majority owner, XX Settembre Holding srl, and President Andrea Langella. The club, with a 117-year history, is set to undergo significant changes and growth through this new agreement.

news.headline: Global Blue Group has announced the repricing of its term loan and revolving credit facility after strong H1 FY2024/25 results. Net leverage reduced from 3.4x to 2.9x. Active de-leveraging continues towards a long-term target of less than 2.5x.
news.summary: In SIGNY, Switzerland, Global Blue Group Holding AG has reported impressive financial performance in the first half of fiscal year 2024/25. The company saw double-digit growth in both revenue and profitability, coupled with robust cash flow generation. During this period, net leverage decreased from 3.4x in June 2024 to 2.9x by September 2024, as the company aims to further reduce it to less than 2.5x in the long term. Given this strong showing, the company initiated a repricing strategy.

news.headline: CoinEx held 11 consecutive Brand Day events in 2024, showcasing its branding strategies and tech innovations amid global crypto competition.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on December 9, 2024, CoinEx, a prominent player in the global crypto industry, has solidified its position as a market leader with innovative branding tactics and technological advancements. Throughout 2024, CoinEx organized 11 successive Brand Day events, showcasing its continued success amidst the competitive crypto landscape.

news.headline: Citi: It's time to bet against rapid ECB rate cuts.
CareTrust REIT buys Midwest portfolio for $97 million, totaling 46 facilities with 3,820 beds/units; also closes phase 1 of TN acquisition.
news.summary: A California-based company, CareTrust REIT, Inc. (NYSE:CTRE), recently disclosed its acquisition of a sizable portfolio in the Midwest. The portfolio consists of 46 facilities, totaling 3,820 beds/units dedicated to skilled nursing and seniors housing. The investment required for this acquisition was around $97 million, covering all transaction costs. Out of the acquired facilities, seven operate as skilled nursing and assisted living campuses, with an additional seven designated as assisted living facilities. This strategic move also involved the company entering into undisclosed agreements in connection with the acquisition.

news.headline: Essity bought back 270,000 Class B shares in week 49, 2024. Dec. 9 news article.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, it was reported that Essity Aktiebolag (publ) had repurchased 270,000 of its own Class B shares (ISIN: SE0009922164) between December 2, 2024, and December 6, 2024. The buyback was conducted in line with the buyback program approved by the Board of Directors.

news.headline: Jeffs’ Brands secures global exclusive to distribute advanced drone safety systems on Amazon for two years.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on December 9, 2024, Jeffs' Brands Ltd, trading under Nasdaq symbols JFBR and JFBRW, disclosed that they secured an exclusive global distribution deal for cutting-edge drone safety systems from a top drone manufacturer. The agreement spans a two-year term and involves specific terms and conditions. Jeffs' Brands will market these state-of-the-art drone safety systems solely through Amazon's international platform.

news.headline: Global Mirror Coatings Market to hit US$ 428M by 2034, growing at 6% CAGR, driven by solar energy, automotive, and construction sectors. East Asia to hold 27.2% market share while epoxy mirror coatings to grow at 5.8% CAGR creating US$ 91.8M opportunity. North America & East Asia to generate US$ 103M opportunity. Innovations like self-cleaning coatings to fuel market growth.
news.summary: The global Mirror Coatings Market is projected to reach a valuation of US$ 239.0 million by 2024, with a further expected expansion at a CAGR of 6% to reach US$ 428.0 billion by 2034. The increasing demand for mirror coatings is primarily driven by global solar energy projects, influencing the efficiency and durability of solar panels. Additionally, mirror coatings are crucial in automotive and construction industries, enhancing vehicle safety, architectural aesthetics, and energy efficiency in buildings.The market is also advancing due to innovations in anti-reflective coatings, catering to the need for low reflectivity of light in various sectors. This leads to higher utilization and return on investment for manufacturers, especially in high-quality mirrors for autos, scientific equipment, and solar energy.Key takeaways from the market study include the creation of a US$ 46.5 million opportunity with a 5.8% CAGR between 2019 and 2023. East Asia is expected to hold a market share of 27.2% in 2034, with epoxy mirror coatings under the Resin type projected to grow at a CAGR of 5.8%, creating an absolute $ opportunity of US$ 91.8 million between 2024 and 2034. North America and East Asia are forecasted to collectively create an absolute $ opportunity of US$ 103 million.Innovations like self-cleaning mirror coatings and advanced properties such as hydrophobic and photocatalytic are expected to drive the mirror coatings market further.

news.headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. to acquire AssuredPartners pending regulatory approval, expected to close Q1 2025.
news.summary: In Rolling Meadows, Illinois, on December 9, 2024, Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. disclosed its plan to buy AssuredPartners by signing a definitive agreement. The completion of this acquisition is contingent upon receiving standard regulatory approvals and is projected to finalize in the initial quarter of 2025. "We are pleased to announce the agreement..."

news.headline: Dow partners with Macquarie to launch Diamond Infrastructure Solutions; Macquarie acquires 40% stake in Dow assets for $2.4B.
news.summary: A private equity fund overseen by Macquarie Asset Management is set to purchase a starting 40% interest in specific infrastructure assets located along the U.S. Gulf Coast currently owned by Dow. The agreement allows for the fund to potentially raise its ownership to 49% within six months following the deal closure. Dow is anticipated to gain around $2.4 billion in initial cash earnings from this transaction.

news.headline: IDEAYA Biosciences develops IDE892, a potential best-in-class MTA-cooperative PRMT5 inhibitor with robust antitumor activity.IND filing soon.
news.summary: IDE892 is a powerful and specific MTA-cooperative PRMT5 inhibitor that possesses favorable ADME properties. It shows strong pathway suppression specific to MTAP deletion, along with long-lasting antitumor effects when combined with IDE397. Additionally, studies for IDE397's IND-enabling are currently in progress, with a focus on targeting IND-filing.

news.headline: Vincent Aurentz joins Forward Therapeutics board of directors in Palm Beach Gardens on Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: A new announcement from Forward Therapeutics, Inc., a leading biopharmaceutical company based in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, stated that Vincent Aurentz has been named to their board of directors on December 9, 2024. The company is focused on revolutionizing the management of chronic inflammatory conditions.

news.headline: Halfpricesoft.com launches ezW2 2024 with W2 Checklist for simplified tax filing. Guide for small businesses in 2025.
news.summary: In Houston on December 9, 2024, Halfpricesoft.com, a prominent provider of innovative tax software solutions, revealed their new W2 Checklist intended to assist small businesses during the upcoming tax season in 2025. This comprehensive tool aims to streamline the tax process and reduce stress for businesses.

news.headline: Noah presents global growth and investment leadership at Corporate Open Day, focusing on expansion and client value.
news.summary: Expanding into growing markets worldwide with new brands, bolstered by strategic investment plans and increased product range, for the benefit of clients. Enhancing services to cater to changing demands, on a global scale. Recently in Shanghai on December 9, 2024, these developments were highlighted.

news.headline: Arelion to develop new PoP at Aruba's Rome data center; partnership aims to help multinational enterprises.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, two major companies, Aruba S.p.A. based in Italy and Arelion, coming from Sweden, have initiated a partnership to address connectivity challenges for multinational enterprises. Aruba S.p.A. is known for its services in cloud computing, data centers, hosting, e-mail systems, domain registration, and PEC services, while Arelion specializes in providing solutions for connectivity issues faced by large international corporations. This partnership is significant as it combines the expertise of both companies to cater to the connectivity needs of businesses across various industries and geographies. The collaboration aims to leverage Aruba's dominance in Italy and Arelion's global connectivity solutions to create a stronger presence in the market. This strategic alliance is expected to drive growth and innovation in the sector, benefiting a wide range of businesses.

news.headline: QinetiQ US expands to Huntsville, AL, strengthening commitment to defense and aerospace sectors with mission-led innovation.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, on December 9, 2024, QinetiQ US, a prominent defense and national security firm, disclosed its venture into Huntsville, Alabama, as part of efforts to enhance its provision of innovative solutions to crucial defense and aerospace industries. This decision signifies a significant step in expanding its operational footprint, showcasing dedication towards advancing capabilities in the field.

news.headline: Graphene market to reach $2.94 billion by 2029, with reports from MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report was released detailing the Graphene Market. The report categorizes graphene into two types: Bulk Graphene and Monolayer Graphene. It discusses various sources, applications, end-use industries such as Automotive & Transportation, Aerospace & Defense, Electronics, and Construction, and regions. The report provides a global forecast for the market up to 2029. The market size and growth projections are included in the report.

news.headline: H.I.G. Capital invests in Central London living sector project; $66 billion capital under management.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, a major global alternative investment firm, H.I.G. Capital, shared that one of its affiliates has made a significant investment in an off-market deal to secure a valuable land plot in a strategic location. H.I.G. Capital manages an impressive $66 billion in capital across its various investments.

news.headline: World Aquatics and Sony partner for cutting-edge technology to enhance aquatic sports; 4-year deal until 2028.
news.summary: An Official Partnership has been established between World Aquatics and Sony Corporation, set to last until 2028. The agreement, announced in LAUSANNE, Switzerland and TOKYO on December 9, 2024, aims to provide captivating sports experiences for aquatic enthusiasts globally. This collaboration is expected to bring exciting events and content to fans over the next four years.

news.headline: Record $3.85B inflows in Crypto ETPs as Bitcoin crosses $100K milestone; Ether reaches $4,000 again.
news.summary: Last week, the cryptocurrency market achieved remarkable milestones as Bitcoin surpassed $100,000 for the first time and Ether reached $4,000. These record-breaking highs reflect the significant growth and investor interest in the digital asset space.
